name: connect-4-solver
description: High-performance solver for a variety of board sizes using NNUE + alpha-beta pruning. Bindings for WASM, Node.js, and React Native.

scripts.install: node-gyp rebuild --jobs max || echo 'Native Addon compilation skipped/failed. Falling back to WASM bundle.'
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
scripts.build:native:pgo: bash build_native_pgo.sh && npx node-gyp rebuild --use_pgo=true --jobs max
scripts.bench:pgo:native: npx node-gyp rebuild --jobs max && npx ts-node tools/bench.ts --native --json > /tmp/c4_baseline.json && echo '--- Baseline captured ---' && npm run build:native:pgo && npx ts-node tools/bench.ts --native --json > /tmp/c4_pgo.json && echo '--- PGO captured ---' && npx ts-node tools/compare-bench.ts /tmp/c4_baseline.json /tmp/c4_pgo.json
scripts.bench:pgo:wasm: bash build.sh && npx ts-node tools/bench.ts --wasm --json > /tmp/c4_wasm_baseline.json && echo '--- WASM Baseline captured ---' && bash build_wasm_pgo.sh && npx ts-node tools/bench.ts --wasm --json > /tmp/c4_wasm_pgo.json && echo '--- WASM PGO captured ---' && npx ts-node tools/compare-bench.ts /tmp/c4_wasm_baseline.json /tmp/c4_wasm_pgo.json
scripts.bench:pgo:docker-wasm: npm run docker:build:wasm && npx ts-node tools/bench.ts --wasm --json > /tmp/c4_wasm_baseline.json && echo '--- WASM Baseline captured ---' && npm run docker:build:wasm:pgo && npx ts-node tools/bench.ts --wasm --json > /tmp/c4_wasm_pgo.json && echo '--- WASM PGO captured ---' && npx ts-node tools/compare-bench.ts /tmp/c4_wasm_baseline.json /tmp/c4_wasm_pgo.json
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm run build:ts && npm run format:check && npm test

author: Tucker Willenborg
